title: Square Footage Calculator – Area in ft²
shortDescription: Calculate the area of a room or space in square feet.
description: Enter the length and width in feet to get the area in square feet and square meters. Runs in your browser — no signup.
metaDescription: Free square footage calculator. Enter length and width in feet to get the area in square feet and square meters — ideal for flooring, paint, and real estate.

result.label: Total area
result.empty: Enter length and width to calculate the area.

sections.heading: How square footage is calculated
paragraphs: Square footage is the area of a rectangular space: length × width, both measured in feet. A room 12 ft by 10 ft is 120 square feet. For non-rectangular rooms, split the space into rectangles, calculate each, and add the results together.

sections.heading: Why square footage matters
paragraphs: Flooring, paint, tile, and carpet are sold by area, so an accurate square footage prevents over- or under-buying. The calculator also shows square meters (1 ft² ≈ 0.0929 m²) for regions that use the metric system.

howTo.name: Measure the length
howTo.text: Enter the length of the space in feet.

howTo.name: Read the area
howTo.text: See the total area in square feet and square meters.

faq.q: How do I calculate square footage?
faq.a: Multiply length by width in feet. A 12 × 10 ft room is 120 ft².

faq.q: How do I find the area of an L-shaped room?
faq.a: Divide it into rectangles, calculate each area, and add them together.

faq.q: How many square feet is a square meter?
faq.a: One square meter is about 10.76 square feet; one square foot is about 0.0929 m².

faq.q: How much flooring do I need?
faq.a: Use the square footage, then add about 5–10% for cuts and waste.
Measure in feet for this tool. Convert other units to feet first, or use our unit converter.
